info.description: Vedex backend API. Authenticate via POST /api/v1/auth/login to get a JWT, then pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected endpoints.
info.title: Vedex API

get.description: Returns all non-deleted announcements. Use query params to filter: name (partial match), urgency (low|medium|high), is_active (true|false).

parameters.description: Filter by urgency: low | medium | high
parameters.name: urgency

post.description: Create a new announcement. Description supports rich text (HTML/Markdown). Use POST /upload/image first to get the image_url.

delete.description: Soft-delete an announcement by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained).

patch.description: Partially update an announcement by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change.

post.description: Single login endpoint for all roles. Returns a JWT — send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected requests.
Register a new user. A unique user ID is generated automatically and returned in the response.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted banners ordered newest first. Filter by name (ILIKE, partial match) or exact category.

post.description: Create a new banner. Upload the thumbnail image via POST /upload/banner-image first and pass the returned URL in the thumbnail field. branches must be a non-empty array of branch names.

delete.description: Soft-delete a banner by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained in the database).

patch.description: Partially update a banner by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Use is_active to toggle the banner without deleting it. To replace the thumbnail, upload a new image via POST /upload/banner-image and pass the returned URL.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted batches with full course and manager details.

post.description: Create a new batch. Restricted to super_admin. A short unique ID is generated automatically. Provide course_short_id to link to a course.

get.description: Filter non-deleted batches by any combination of fields. All query params are optional.

delete.description: Soft-delete a batch by its short_id.

patch.description: Partially update a batch by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Use is_active to activate or deactivate. Set additional_manager_id to "" to clear it.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted blogs ordered newest first. Filter by title (ILIKE), status, or date (YYYY-MM-DD based on created_at).

parameters.description: Filter by status: published | draft | scheduled
parameters.name: status

post.description: Create a new blog post. Upload featured_image via POST /upload/blog-image first and pass the returned URL here. status must be one of: published | draft | scheduled. When status is "scheduled", publish_at (RFC3339) is required. When status is "published" and publish_at is omitted, it defaults to now.

delete.description: Soft-delete a blog by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained in the database).

patch.description: Partially update a blog by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Use is_active to toggle the blog active/inactive without deleting it.

get.description: Returns all active, non-deleted coding questions ordered by creation date.

post.description: Create a new coding practice question. Restricted to super_admin.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted coding questions including inactive ones.
Returns a single active coding question by its short_id.

delete.description: Soft-delete a coding question by its short_id.

patch.description: Partially update a coding question by its short_id.

get.description: Returns all active and inactive non-deleted courses.

post.description: Create a new course. Restricted to super_admin role. A short unique ID is generated automatically.

get.description: Search non-deleted courses by name or description. Pass the search term as query param `q`.

delete.description: Soft-delete a course by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained).

patch.description: Partially update a course by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Use is_active to activate or deactivate.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted events ordered newest first. Use query params `name` and `status` to filter results.

parameters.description: Filter by event name (case-insensitive, partial match)
parameters.name: name

post.description: Create a new event. The image_url should be the URL returned after uploading to storage. Description supports rich text (HTML/Markdown).

delete.description: Soft-delete an event by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained).

patch.description: Partially update an event by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted feedback forms ordered newest first.

post.description: Step 1 + 2: pick a form_type and a template. No title or description needed — the title is auto-generated from the template. Valid combos: session_feedback → blank_form | trainer_performance | course_content | overall_satisfaction; link_to_course → blank_form | content_rating | csat | course_rating; general_survey → blank_form only. Restricted to super_admin, mentor, and team_lead.

400.description: Validation error or invalid form_type/template combo

get.description: Returns a single non-deleted feedback form along with all its questions ordered by order_index.

delete.description: Soft-delete a feedback form by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained). Restricted to super_admin, mentor, and team_lead.

patch.description: Partially update a feedback form by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Use is_active: false to disable the form and is_active: true to re-enable it. Restricted to super_admin, mentor, and team_lead.

post.description: Add a new question to an existing feedback form. Supported types: session_rating, trainer_rating, single_choice, multiple_choice, star_rating, linear_scale, date, number, short_answer, long_answer. For scale types supply scale_min/scale_max and optional start_label/end_label. For choice types supply options[]. Restricted to super_admin, mentor, and team_lead.

delete.description: Permanently remove a question from a feedback form. Restricted to super_admin, mentor, and team_lead.

patch.description: Partially update a question in a feedback form. Send only the fields you want to change. To clear the options array send "options": []. To clear scale labels send "start_label": "" or "end_label": "". Restricted to super_admin, mentor, and team_lead.

post.description: Student submits answers to an active feedback form. Each answer must reference a question_short_id belonging to this form. For text questions supply "text", for numeric (star/scale/number) supply "number", for choice questions supply "array".

400.description: Validation error or question not found in form

404.description: Form not found or not active

get.description: Returns server health status
Returns all active mentors. Use this to populate the batch manager dropdown.
Returns all non-deleted modules ordered newest first.

post.description: Create a new module. Set max_view_duration to "unlimited" or "restricted". When "restricted", watch_time_minutes is required and defines the maximum minutes a student may view content. watch_time_minutes is ignored when max_view_duration is "unlimited".

get.description: Filter non-deleted modules by any combination of fields. All query params are optional.

delete.description: Soft-delete a module by its short_id.

patch.description: Partially update a module by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Switching max_view_duration to "unlimited" automatically clears watch_time_minutes.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted sections for the given module ordered by creation time.

post.description: Add a new section to an existing module. Set is_prerequisite to true if students must complete this section before accessing the rest of the module.

delete.description: Soft-delete a section from a module.

patch.description: Partially update a section within a module. Send only the fields you want to change.

get.description: Returns all active materials for the given section, ordered by creation date.

post.description: Create a new material inside a section. For file-based materials (video, pdf, image, etc.), first upload the file via POST /upload/material to get a URL, then pass it as file_url. For link type, pass the external URL directly as file_url. max_views must be "unlimited" or "limited"; if "limited", max_views_count is required. allow_access_on must be "both" or "app".

delete.description: Soft-delete a material from a section.

patch.description: Partially update a material. Send only the fields you want to change.

post.description: Save a code submission for the authenticated user against a coding question.

get.description: Returns every submission with student name, email, and question title.
Returns all submissions made by the authenticated user across all questions.
Returns all submissions by the authenticated user for the given coding question short_id.
get.summary: Get current user's submissions for a specific question

get.description: Returns all submissions for the given user UUID, including question title and user details.
get.summary: List submissions for a specific user (admin/mentor)

post.description: Upload a thumbnail image for a banner. Returns the public URL to use in the thumbnail field when creating or updating a banner. Max size 10 MB. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF.

200.description: url: public URL of the uploaded image

post.description: Upload an image for a blog post. Returns the public URL to use in the featured_image field when creating or updating a blog. Max size 10 MB. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF.

200.description: url: public URL of the uploaded image

post.description: Upload an image from a device file picker or camera capture. Returns the public URL to use in create/update event. Max size 10 MB. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF.

200.description: url: public URL of the uploaded image

post.description: Upload any supported material file (image, video, audio, PDF, doc, sheet, slide, zip, etc.) to Supabase Storage. Returns the public URL to use when creating a section material. Max size 500 MB.

200.description: url: public URL of the uploaded file

get.description: Returns all active (non-deleted) users.
Returns all soft-deleted users (where deleted_at is set).
Search active users by name (first, last, or full), email, phone, or user ID. Pass the term as query param `q`.

delete.description: Soft-delete a user by ID (sets deleted_at; the row is retained in the database).

patch.description: Partially update a user — send only the fields you want to change (first_name, last_name, phone, date_of_birth).
Promotes or changes a user's role. Only super_admin can call this. The old role-specific profile is deleted and a new one is created.

description.example: Important: The platform will be down for 2 hours.

additional_manager_id.example: use GET /mentors to pick a real ID

batch_manager_id.example: use GET /mentors to pick a real ID

excerpt.example: A brief introduction to the Go programming language.

description.example: Join us for a hands-on Go workshop.

batch_manager_id.example: use GET /mentors to pick a real ID
